name: domain-agent
title: Domain Context Agent
description: Turns product-specific language, users, constraints, and trust requirements into a verified brief before design or implementation.
useWhen: The product operates in a specific industry
Requirements include domain terminology or trust constraints
A brief is too vague to design safely
avoidWhen: You need legal, medical, or financial advice
The domain facts have not been supplied
A narrow CSS fix needs no product discovery
